summary: Clear front‑of‑board audience recording captures an exceptional Philadelphia show from spring 1984
review: This digital FOB audience tape offers a surprisingly clear, well‑defined sound with great dynamic range, making it very enjoyable on a good system. The reviewer praises the entire Philly run as a highlight of Spring 1984 and recommends the download, noting only occasional “Phil Bomb” moments as a standout bass feature.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review, but it is strongly positive about both the performance and the audio quality, leading to an overall high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear and well‑defined audience (FOB) recording with great dynamic range; occasional crowd ambience but overall very listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific set‑list comments, but the reviewer describes the entire Philadelphia run as exceptional and a highlight of spring 1984.

band_member_comments.Phil: Occasional “Phil Bomb” noted, indicating an especially strong bass performance.
